steps.name: oscal-parser
steps.summary: OscalParser, GenericFrameworkParser, BaselineGenerator implemented with 15 unit tests — parses OSCAL JSON catalogs and ASVS JSON, generates baseline YAML with empty verification_methods

steps.name: scanner-mapper
steps.summary: ScannerSuggester implemented with keyword-based scanner mapping — suggest() and apply_suggestions() with 9 unit tests, all labelled 'suggested — review required'

steps.name: cli-import
steps.summary: import-framework CLI command with OSCAL/ASVS/generic-json parsing, keyword-based scanner suggestions, URL support, and summary output — 6 unit tests, ADR-012 added
